display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul's doing the pick-ups in Lancashire where a rare 1960 Vauxhall Cresta PA Friary estate in dusky pink awaits.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A vivid Dutch DAF 66 - in daffodil yellow - lands at the North Yorkshire showroom.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads out to pick up a pair of beautiful Swedish models - a Saab 96L and a Volvo P1800ES. Plus, a rare British AC Aceca comes up for sale.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien repurposes an old butcher's block into a coffee table, while Henry Cole restores a pair of go-karts to race against restorer Guy.

programme.title: Our Guy in India
programme.desc: Guy Martin buys a Royal Enfield bike with a traditional Hindu blessing at a Delhi market, visits Asia's biggest truck yard, and sleeps among rats as he waits for a late train.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Our Guy in Japan
programme.desc: Guy Martin finds out how Japan deals with 1500 earthquakes a year, enters the gang culture of Tokyo, and tries the unique form of Japanese speedway first-hand.

programme.title: Our Guy in Japan
programme.desc: Guy Martin visits a slum in Yokohama, pays his respects at Hiroshima and takes a dip in a mildly radioactive spring, and participates in one of Japan's oldest fireworks festivals.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A collection of Austin Mini Metros arrive for auction. Also under the hammer is a baby Fiat 850 coupe and a haulier offloads part of his vintage vehicle collection.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There's an unlikely arrival at the North Yorkshire car auction - an Argentinian Army Mercedes G wagon that saw action in the Falklands War.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Recalling America's entry into World War II after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, the great Laurence Olivier sheds more light on the deadliest conflict in history.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Secrets of Nazi Future Tech: Hidden in a remote mountainous forest is a structure nicknamed the Fly Trap or Hitler's Stonehenge. Researchers still have no definitive idea what it is.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts value items at Hatfield House in Hertfordshire, while Fiona Bruce goes for a drive in a Daimler Dart - the car featured in the programme's opening credits.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Chatsworth House in Derbyshire, where objects include a tile commemorating one of the biggest bare-knuckle fights in history.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul's on a big day out collecting a 1971 Jaguar E-Type and a 1933 Morgan 3-wheeler Supersport but first there's a flock of 300 chickens to negotiate before he can load up.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's in fast car heaven as he picks up a rare Subaru Impreza and an equally powerful Ford Escort RS Cosworth from North Wales.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Recalling America's entry into World War II after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, the great Laurence Olivier sheds more light on the deadliest conflict in history.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Secrets of Nazi Future Tech: Hidden in a remote mountainous forest is a structure nicknamed the Fly Trap or Hitler's Stonehenge. Researchers still have no definitive idea what it is.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts value items at Hatfield House in Hertfordshire, while Fiona Bruce goes for a drive in a Daimler Dart - the car featured in the programme's opening credits.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: A window gets smashed onboard the Naughty Lass and Robbie Cumming receives a soaking inside the very wet Blisworth Tunnel on the Grand Union Canal.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to Colchester to pick up a 1960 Aston Martin DB4 that has been sitting under a tarpaulin in a garage that has collapsed round it for 40 years.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team take on one of Derek's favourites - an Austin A35 - but its age ensures some hefty bills. To bank some cash, their second project is a quick flip - a 1999 BMW Z3.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul's on a big day out collecting a 1971 Jaguar E-Type and a 1933 Morgan 3-wheeler Supersport but first there's a flock of 300 chickens to negotiate before he can load up.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's in fast car heaven as he picks up a rare Subaru Impreza and an equally powerful Ford Escort RS Cosworth from North Wales.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A collection of Austin Mini Metros arrive for auction. Also under the hammer is a baby Fiat 850 coupe and a haulier offloads part of his vintage vehicle collection.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole refurbishes a classic Ford Mustang and a neon garage sign, while Simon O'Brien restores a classic Chopper bicycle and turns a bass guitar into a chair.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: Mackenzie is presented with a classic locked-room murder when a hairdresser is found strangled to death in her beauty salon, with no evidence of a break-in.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Neville must solve a mystery from the past that unlocks the truth of who murdered renowned concert pianist Pasha Verdinikov and why.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Murder on the Day of the Dead: A man receives a voicemail from his wife saying she is being attacked - and when her body turns up, Jack is suspicious of a butterfly found on her clothing.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a raw diamond is found at the scene of a murder, Major Crimes sets up a stakeout to take down the suspected gem smugglers.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch meets a Scotland Yard detective who thinks the killer they're after is Jack the Ripper.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the forensics pioneer in the mystery set in 19th century Toronto. At a gala ball, Murdoch witnesses the unveiling of a dinosaur.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the forensics pioneer working in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch investigates a daring robbery, seemingly by Harry Houdini.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the forensics pioneer in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. A prostitute is killed in a high-class brothel.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Sergeant Goodfellow turns to Father Brown when he witnesses Inspector Mallory frame an innocent man.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick pits his old team against his new work colleagues in a challenge to solve the murder of a fitness trainer. Teresa finds out Sally Carter has committed suicide.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex receive an award for heroism while Major Crimes investigates an extremist threat.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama. The murder of a lawyer coincides with the parole of a former client, but Carrie isn't convinced this was an act of revenge. Why has he gone on the run.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The leader of a spiritual retreat is strangled, but with all the group members meditating together at the time of the murder, finding the killer could prove tricky.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the forensics pioneer working in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch investigates a daring robbery, seemingly by Harry Houdini.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the forensics pioneer in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. A prostitute is killed in a high-class brothel.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick pits his old team against his new work colleagues in a challenge to solve the murder of a fitness trainer. Teresa finds out Sally Carter has committed suicide.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex receive an award for heroism while Major Crimes investigates an extremist threat.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Sergeant Goodfellow turns to Father Brown when he witnesses Inspector Mallory frame an innocent man.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama. The murder of a lawyer coincides with the parole of a former client, but Carrie isn't convinced this was an act of revenge. Why has he gone on the run.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: Mackenzie is presented with a classic locked-room murder when a hairdresser is found strangled to death in her beauty salon, with no evidence of a break-in.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A jewellery store robbery leads Sabrina into the predatory world of online gambling, while a young man's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: In rural Montana, the team hunts down a brutal serial killer obsessed with wolves, all while dealing with local Rangers out for their own form of vigilante justice.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Sergeant Goodfellow turns to Father Brown when he witnesses Inspector Mallory frame an innocent man.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The leader of a spiritual retreat is strangled, but with all the group members meditating together at the time of the murder, finding the killer could prove tricky.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: In an elimination challenge centred on reinventing the judges' quick carb midweek dinner recipes, mistakes and time pressure sends one cook home. S18 E9

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody keeps his distance.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Richie gets it wrong. Cash struggles with Eden's decision. Crime escalates in Summer Bay.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Tonight it's a wild and wacky road trip back home, off the beaten track through South Australia. From Kangaroo Island to the Southern Ocean and the underground town of Coober Pedy.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is sent to jail after a brawl at the Springfield St. Patrick's Day parade; Marge unwittingly begins working at an erotic bakery. S20 E1

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy hosts a Sheldon-style brunch at Penny's apartment, and Howard starts to freak out about parenthood after feeling the baby kick for the first time. S10 E6

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Richie gets another shot. Jo digs herself a deeper hole with Tane. Tane's called to visit his family.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy presents a challenge.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It is the first team challenge, and the contestants are all eager to see how well they can work together. The bottom two teams will find themselves in the elimination the following day. S18 E10

programme.title: Destination X UK
programme.desc: The mystery tour reaches new heights, and tensions are high, as the passengers look for clues to the location of Destination X. S1 E2

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Potential love interests are introduced by gradually revealing their naked bodies... Then the contestants must choose a partner based on their first impressions.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The series reaches its majestic climax. Who will win Greg Davies's coveted golden head to become just the seventh Taskmaster Champion in history?

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Following his escape, the notorious 'Dick and Jane' killer resurfaces when he e-mails a disturbing video to the father of one of his brides, threatening to take her life. S11 E20

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A sex scandal in the suburbs between two neighbours reveals a deadly secret and eventually leads to a missing pilot. S8 E2

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Season Finale: As Ellen uses the Malina videotope to fight the charges that she killed her fiancé, Patty engineers a confrontation that brings the lawsuit to a dramatic conclusion. S1 E13

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: A unique family of employees at a super-sized megastore hilariously tackle the day-to-day grind of rabid bargain hunters, riot-causing sales, and nap-worthy training sessions.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back with a bang! Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Tama, Buzz, and the new kid on the block, Riki. Get ready for laughter, learning, and lots of fun!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It is the first team challenge, and the contestants are all eager to see how well they can work together. The bottom two teams will find themselves in the elimination the following day. S18 E10

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy presents a challenge.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - NZ v Iran
programme.desc: Join us for Live coverage of the first match for New Zealand in Group G as they take on Iran from SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California.

programme.title: Tipping Point: Best Ever Finals
programme.desc: Look back at some of the most dramatic end games in Tipping History, including agonising trades and jackpot counters teetering on the edge.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Season Premiere: The chase is on for Delta team Jordan and Manaia. DOC's Adeline and Pru deal with sleeping giants and hidden rodents. Biosecurity team Huia and Rob get a message from the Stone Age.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Season Premiere: There’s a car flipped in a ditch, in a downpour. A furious farmer lets fly. An optimistic driver is betting on his blood test. S10 E1

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matty and Olympia navigate a new trust dynamic with Julian as he accompanies Matty to surveil the ex-wife of a Wellbrexa exec. S2 E10

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - NZ v Iran
programme.desc: Join us for a replay of the first match for New Zealand in Group G as they take on Iran from SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Agnes and the Brown family await the fruits of their fraud after faking Grandad's death in order to get a payout, but the insurance company starts to get suspicious.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Season Premiere: New host of "Grand Designs Australia" Anthony Burke is joined by Grand Designs U.K. icon Kevin McCloud on a road trip to see the best contemporary Australian architecture.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish laughs. According to Shakespeare, 'wine is a gentle stimulant and good companion' - and so is Terry on the night Bob gets breathalysed.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The original men behaving badly. Bob and Terry challenge each other to a cross-country cycle race. Of course, you would expect the wily Terry to cheat - but Bob.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Some Day We'll Laugh about This: Brilliant 1970s sitcom. Bob and Thelma go away to Scotland for the weekend, leaving Terry in charge of their new home. Will Bob never learn.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Clement and La Frenais' sitcom sequel. Terry is off his beer and making midnight visits to Bob's house to discuss the meaning and mystery of life. Could this be love.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Sitcom about two ill-matched friends, from the writers of Porridge and Auf Wiedersehen Pet. Bob's married life promises work, worry and wallpapering.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish laughs. According to Shakespeare, 'wine is a gentle stimulant and good companion' - and so is Terry on the night Bob gets breathalysed.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The original men behaving badly. Bob and Terry challenge each other to a cross-country cycle race. Of course, you would expect the wily Terry to cheat - but Bob.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Some Day We'll Laugh about This: Brilliant 1970s sitcom. Bob and Thelma go away to Scotland for the weekend, leaving Terry in charge of their new home. Will Bob never learn.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Clement and La Frenais' sitcom sequel. Terry is off his beer and making midnight visits to Bob's house to discuss the meaning and mystery of life. Could this be love.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Sitcom about two ill-matched friends, from the writers of Porridge and Auf Wiedersehen Pet. Bob's married life promises work, worry and wallpapering.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish laughs. According to Shakespeare, 'wine is a gentle stimulant and good companion' - and so is Terry on the night Bob gets breathalysed.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The original men behaving badly. Bob and Terry challenge each other to a cross-country cycle race. Of course, you would expect the wily Terry to cheat - but Bob.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Some Day We'll Laugh about This: Brilliant 1970s sitcom. Bob and Thelma go away to Scotland for the weekend, leaving Terry in charge of their new home. Will Bob never learn.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Ben Robinson visits Laxey on the Isle of Man to discover the unusual attraction that drew Victorians to the tourist destination - the biggest waterwheel in the world.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews from West Midlands Ambulance Service attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a young mum with severe stomach pains, take a breathless pensioner to hospital and attend an elderly lady with dementia whose nose will not stop bleeding.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Dudley crews attend a man with heart failure and sepsis, as well as a transgender patient who's in a lot of pain from an old injury. In Stoke, a patient has a panic attack in the ambulance.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews from West Midlands Ambulance Service attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a young mum with severe stomach pains, take a breathless pensioner to hospital and attend an elderly lady with dementia whose nose will not stop bleeding.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Dudley crews attend a man with heart failure and sepsis, as well as a transgender patient who's in a lot of pain from an old injury. In Stoke, a patient has a panic attack in the ambulance.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Designer Sam designs a model of Winston Churchill's funeral wagon; First time modeller Simon builds Britain's biggest model railway layout from his memory.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: The team at Hornby are creating a replica of the West Coast Mainline train the APT to top speed.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Hornby's young designer Paramjit Sembhi takes on the challenge of building a new version of the iconic RAF fighter of World War II, the Spitfire.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: After visiting an original Mosquito at the de Havilland aircraft museum, Airfix designer Paramjit attempts to shrink the wooden wonder to 1:72 scale.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: The Intercity 125 gets an overhaul and the pressure is on to design two quick build models of the Ford Mustang in time for the summer holiday.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Designer Sam designs a model of Winston Churchill's funeral wagon; First time modeller Simon builds Britain's biggest model railway layout from his memory.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: The team at Hornby are creating a replica of the West Coast Mainline train the APT to top speed.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Hornby's young designer Paramjit Sembhi takes on the challenge of building a new version of the iconic RAF fighter of World War II, the Spitfire.
